title: Collection Relationship
description: How two collections are related. References are scoped to the same get_products response. Symmetric types (companion, crossover) do not require both collections to declare the relationship.

enumDescriptions.spinoff: A collection derived from the referenced collection (e.g., an after-collection or character spinoff)
enumDescriptions.companion: A companion collection (behind-the-scenes, reaction, or supplementary content)
enumDescriptions.sequel: A continuation of the referenced collection
enumDescriptions.prequel: A predecessor to the referenced collection
enumDescriptions.crossover: Shows that share installments, guests, or story arcs
